providers.name: hostinger_dns_parking
providers.note: Registrar default DNS (NOT PPC parking). Hostinger's docs confirm ns1/apollo/artemis/… are Hostinger DNS pool shards. Kept in v1 for volume tracking; downstream consumers should not aggregate with PPC providers.

providers.name: dynadot_dyna_ns
providers.note: Registrar managed DNS for active customers (NOT parking). Used when Dynadot's DNS / forwarding / site builder is enabled. Kept in v1 for volume tracking; downstream consumers should not aggregate with PPC providers.

providers.name: parkingcrew
providers.note: Team Internet AG's PPC parking NS. ~200 new apex/24h on newly_registered_domains, but ~27k FQDN+cert observations/snap from existing portfolio.

providers.name: above_legacy
providers.note: Legacy NS; mostly migrated to abovedomains.com

providers.name: above_redirect
providers.note: Inferred Above-family: redirector pattern across AS212317 + AWS IE/US

providers.name: taoa
providers.note: Tier C: registrar default DNS, NOT PPC parking. taoa.com homepage is a Chinese domain registrar (淘阿网). NS1/NS2.taoa.com are their customer-default NS.

providers.name: xundns
providers.note: Tier C: CN DNS-as-a-service, NOT PPC parking. xundns.com resolves to DNS.LA (帝恩爱斯) marketing site offering free smart DNS, anti-DDoS DNS, registration.

providers.name: julydns
providers.note: Tier C: DNS hosting service, NOT PPC parking. julydns.com homepage is a self-hosted '域名控制面板 V3.0' (DNS control panel). Registered via Gname (SG), CF backend.

providers.name: mismes
providers.note: Tier C: registrar default DNS, NOT PPC parking. WHOIS shows registrar Xin Net Technology (新网) and NS host NS11/12.xincache.com (Xin Net's brand).

providers.name: share_dns
providers.note: Watchlist: no public website, registered via Gname (SG) 2022, CF backend, paired NS pattern, samples are numeric CN-style. Operator unidentified — could be grey-area DNS service. Revisit before promoting.

providers.name: spixiv
providers.note: Watchlist: no public website, GoDaddy + DomainsByProxy privacy, samples are algorithm-generated 4-letter .top subdomains (DGA-shaped). Could be SEO/black-hat bulk infrastructure, not classic PPC.

providers.name: jindun9
providers.note: Watchlist: jindun9.com created 2025-12-27 (5 months old), GoDaddy + DBP privacy, samples include .sbs phish-style domains (17cchigua.sbs etc). Likely short-lived scam infrastructure.

providers.name: onclouddns
providers.note: Watchlist: onclouddns.com created 2026-04-17 (1 MONTH old) yet handles ~3k new domains/day. Brand-new opaque operator — may not survive a quarter.

providers.name: dnsowl
providers.note: AS47846 (Sedo) but samples look aftermarket/phish; revisit before promoting
